title: Sponge LuckyBlock
description: Sponge transforms into a lucky block.
body:
# SpongeLuck Transformation
It transforms ordinary sponges into mysterious Lucky Blocks.
It transforms both wet and dry sponges into Lucky Blocks.

Installation:
1.Go  to the menu and click “Options”: In the game menu, you will find the “Options” feature, which you need to click.
2.Load the resource pack into the game folder: You can do this by dragging and dropping the texture pack file into the game folder.
3.Drop the resource pack in the game options and settings window: This method works for versions 1.16 or newer.
